title: HTTP Connection
description: A query-style data connection that fetches rows from an HTTP(S) endpoint. This effort only declares and validates the connection; it is never dialed (no live fetch). config carries the endpoint and request shape; credentials are referenced indirectly via the connection's secretRefs, never inlined here.

url.description: Absolute HTTP(S) endpoint the connection would query.

method.description: HTTP method used for the request.

headers.description: Static request headers. Values are literal strings; secret values must be supplied via the connection's secretRefs rather than inlined.

query.description: Static query-string parameters appended to the request URL.
